source.name: Lab 2.0: Command-generator prompt
source.instructions:
Complete **Lab 2.0**: copy **`command_prompt_v3_slot_names.jinja2`** into **`level5/data/prompts/`** and set **`prompt_template`** on **`SearchReadyLLMCommandGenerator`** in **`level5/config.yml`**. To pass, all checks must pass:

• Check 1: **`level5/data/prompts/command_prompt_v3_slot_names.jinja2`** exists.
• Check 2: **`config.yml`** sets **`prompt_template`** to reference **`data/prompts/command_prompt_v3_slot_names.jinja2`**.

Full score: 10/10.
source.guidance: Ensure the Jinja2 file is under data/prompts/ and prompt_template matches Lab 2.0 instructions.
